title: Movement | Logos
description: Ways to contribute to the Logos movement.

hero.title: Logos Movement
hero.body: Logos is a movement of builders, activists, and community organisers rebuilding civil society with tools that help people coordinate, communicate, and solve problems where they live.

intro.body: Technology alone won't save us. Join 2000+ activists and organisations working to rebuild civil society, together.

activism.title: Activism
activism.body: Join a Circle to meet fellow activists and solve issues that affect your local community.

coalition.title: Coalition
coalition.body: Collaborate with organisations innovating at the intersection of tech and civil society.

building.title: Impact Building
building.body: Build tech that creates real impact by solving local problems around the world.

campaign.title: Join an Activist Circle
campaign.body: Logos Circles are self-organised groups that take action to solve winnable issues that matter locally, from community cleanups and food drives to issue advocacy and more.

find.title: Find a Circle near you.
find.body: Activist leaders are organising around the world to solve winnable issues that impact them.

activismSection.title: Activism in Action
activismSection.body: Local Circles are solving winnable issues every week. Get inspired by recent successes from around the world.

events.title: Upcoming Events
events.body: Ideas from our community driving sovereignty forward.

card.title: Logos Circle Florianopolis #2
card.hosts: By InfinityBase, Logos, JB and Fabio Seva

involved.title: Get involved.
involved.body: Chat with fellow activists every week on X Spaces, or join the community to get connected with your local Circle.

coalition.title: Join the Coalition.
coalition.body: It takes a village. From network states to homeschooling collectives, organisations from around the world are uniting to rebuild civil society, together.

builder.title: Become an Activist Builder
builder.body: Every movement needs its tools. Build applications alongside activists to solve community problems with impact.

problem.label: Problem
problem.body: Grassroots projects in Benin struggle to access funding due to low trust in traditional charity platforms, limited transparency, and a focus on short-term donations.

solution.label: Solution
solution.body: Build a regenerative fundraising platform where users support local causes through yield-generating staking, transparent governance, and community-driven funding allocation.

stack.label: Stack
stack.body: React, Node.js, Aave/Morpho, Logos Messaging, Status, tokenised RWAs, DAO governance, and privacy-preserving identity.

resources.body: Ideas from our community driving sovereignty forward.

start.title: Start your own Circle
start.body: Advanced privacy for a new era of decentralised applications and social institutions.

forum.title: Forum
forum.body: Advanced privacy for a new era of decentralised applications and social institutions.

discord.title: Discord
discord.body: Advanced privacy for a new era of decentralised applications and social institutions.
